scripts.setup:powersoftau: snarkjs powersoftau new bn128 12 build/pot12_0000.ptau -v && snarkjs powersoftau contribute build/pot12_0000.ptau build/pot12_0001.ptau --name="First contribution" -v && snarkjs powersoftau prepare phase2 build/pot12_0001.ptau build/pot12_final.ptau -v
scripts.setup:groth16: snarkjs groth16 setup build/main.r1cs build/pot12_final.ptau build/main_0000.zkey && snarkjs zkey contribute build/main_0000.zkey build/main_0001.zkey --name="1st Contributor Name" -v && snarkjs zkey export verificationkey build/main_0001.zkey build/verification_key.json
scripts.setup: npm run compile:sudoku && npm run setup:powersoftau && npm run setup:groth16
